title: Aranet Continuous Environmental Evidence for Cold Storage Compliance
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| where match(lower(coalesce(location, zone, "")), "(?i)cold|chill|reefer")
| eval breach=if(temp>5 OR temp<-30,1,0)
| stats sum(breach) as breach_events count as samples min(temp) as min_c max(temp) as max_c by location
description: Regulated cold chains require continuous monitoring evidence; Aranet sensors provide timestamped proof of remain-in-range.
value: Supports GDP/GMP conversations with auditors and reduces manual clipboard checks.
implementation: (1) Validate calibration certificates. (2) Map thresholds to SKU requirements. (3) Immutable storage or export for QA.
grandmaExplanation: We keep a continuous record that cold rooms stayed within safe temperatures.
